title: The Fruits and the Evas
wikitext:
[]: The Fruits and the Eva's. Post by Eliaskar » Sat Jul 14, 2012 1:59 pm I was just contemplating the whole debacle of the S2 Engine (Fruit of Life) and Fruit Of Knowledge thing in relation to the Eva's and was wondering, if Eva Unit 01 has the Fruit of Knowledge like Humans do because it is a clone of Lilith, then why don't the other Eva's have Fruits of Life if they are clones of Adam? It made sense that Unit 01 had to obtain the S2 Engine somehow but why don't the others have it anyway is basically what i'm asking. Or is this just a plot hole or something?

[]: Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Jul 14, 2012 2:33 pm The clones are incomplete. NERV has extreme difficulty replicating the S2 Engine, which is why they tried to put Ramiel's inside Eva Unit 04. Even then, it malfunctioned and basically exploded.

[]: Post by Ornette » Sat Jul 14, 2012 5:02 pm Take a look here: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/4704/Evas-and-S2-Engines/ http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/8108/Why-didnt-NERV-give-the-Evas-S2-Engines/

[]: Post by Stryker » Sat Jul 14, 2012 5:03 pm I heard Eva 01 loves pineapples. Oh wait, we're talking about S2 engines?

[]: Post by Reichu » Thu Jul 19, 2012 8:53 am AuraTwilight wrote: which is why they tried to put Ramiel's inside Eva Unit 04.

[]: Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Jul 19, 2012 3:40 pm Right, my mistake. I knew it was one of those two, bleh.
